style: Graphic-novel illustration, bold inked linework, cel-shaded flats with hard shadow edges, limited palette of rust orange, soot charcoal and pale amber, dramatic single key light. Painterly sci-fi comic panel. No text, no speech bubbles, no captions, no lettering, no borders, no panel gutters.

images.scene: Deep space debris field after a freighter explosion, 5-minute OHLCV trading game art style. Glowing hull fragments tumbling in slow motion, emergency beacon lights blinking amber, gas venting in iridescent plumes against star-field. Widescreen 16:9 cinematic background, painterly space-opera aesthetic, dark moody palette with warm orange-red fire glow.
